turn.speaker: 系统架构师
turn.content: 这就是我们的Gate机制。我们定义了三个验证门：Gate 1是Schema门，Gate 2是Logic门，这两个都是blocking的，任何失败都会立即阻止启动。

    InputA["Configuration File A<br/JSON Format"]
    InputB["Configuration File B<br/JSON Format"]

    DiffTool["Diff Tool<br/Comparison Engine"]
    GenerateDiff["Generate Diff Report"]
    AnalyzeDiff["Analyze Differences"]
    RuntimeCheck["Runtime Validation"]
    ResourceCheck["Resource Availability"]
    ConstraintCheck["Constraint Validation"]

turn.speaker: 系统架构师
turn.content: Gate 3是Runtime门，它只是warning only模式。即使运行时检查发现问题，系统仍会继续启动，但会记录警告日志供运维人员关注。

turn.content: Error Handling组提供了分层的错误诊断。Schema Validation Error会指出具体字段位置，Business Logic Error会显示约束细节，Runtime Validation Error则会给出具体的修复建议。

metadata.normalized_code:
flowchart TD
    %% Define the main sections
    subgraph InputSources["📥 Input Sources"]
        InputA["Configuration File A<br/JSON Format"]
        InputB["Configuration File B<br/JSON Format"]
    end
    subgraph SchemaValidation["🔍 Schema Validation"]
        Schema["JSON Schema<br/Validation Rules"]
        ValidateA["Validate Configuration A"]
        ValidateB["Validate Configuration B"]
    end
    subgraph DiffAnalysis["🔎 Diff Analysis"]
        DiffTool["Diff Tool<br/Comparison Engine"]
        GenerateDiff["Generate Diff Report"]
        AnalyzeDiff["Analyze Differences"]
    end
    subgraph OutputGeneration["📊 Output Generation"]
        FormatDiff["Format Diff Output"]
        FinalReport["Final Diff Report<br/HTML/PDF Format"]
    end
    subgraph RuntimeValidation["⚙️ Runtime Validation"]
        RuntimeCheck["Runtime Validation"]
        ResourceCheck["Resource Availability"]
        ConstraintCheck["Constraint Validation"]
    end
    %% Define the connections
    InputA -- ValidateA
    InputB -- ValidateB
    Schema -- ValidateA
    Schema -- ValidateB
    ValidateA --|"Valid"| DiffTool
    ValidateB --|"Valid"| DiffTool
    ValidateA --|"Invalid"| ErrorA["Validation Error A<br/Stop Process"]
    ValidateB --|"Invalid"| ErrorB["Validation Error B<br/Stop Process"]
    DiffTool -- GenerateDiff
    GenerateDiff -- AnalyzeDiff
    AnalyzeDiff -- FormatDiff
    FormatDiff -- FinalReport
    RuntimeCheck -- ResourceCheck
    RuntimeCheck -- ConstraintCheck
    %% Apply styling
    classDef inputStyle fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#1565c0,stroke-width:2px
    classDef validationStyle fill:#fff8e1,stroke:#f9a825,stroke-width:2px
    classDef diffStyle fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#c2185b,stroke-width:2px
    classDef outputStyle fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef errorStyle fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:2px
    class InputA,InputB inputStyle
    class Schema,ValidateA,ValidateB validationStyle
    class DiffTool,GenerateDiff,AnalyzeDiff diffStyle
    class FormatDiff,FinalReport outputStyle
    class ErrorA,ErrorB errorStyle

turn.speaker: 系统架构师
turn.content: Validation Modes组定义了三种运行模式。Strict Mode所有门都是blocking的，Lenient Mode运行时门只产生警告，Test Mode会跳过运行时检查以加快测试速度。

turn.speaker: 后端工程师
turn.content: 这样可以覆盖开发、测试、生产不同环境的需要了。开发环境用Test Mode快速迭代，测试环境用Lenient Mode，生成环境用Strict Mode确保安全。
